goal: Implement named ranking profiles, source semantic search for indexed files, and agent prompts that choose the correct search mode by user intent.
global_constraints: Do not let the AI bot pass raw fulltext/vector/graph weights.
Keep source_data distinct from accepted knowledge in results, prompts and trace.
Use local embeddings only; do not add a new external search API.
Index source_data vectors only for explicit source modes and keep source_data distinct from accepted knowledge.
Block and report documents where secrets are detected; index PII-bearing documents with admin audit issue.
Use document-level source vectors temporarily until MemorySearchSegment is implemented.
Update ADR, planning and generated project structure when files are added.
